title: materialized views do not use their namespace when calling nested parameterized views, leading to UNKNOWN_FUNCTION unless explicitly qualifying nested views
description:
### Company or project name
fintech
### Describe what's wrong
When calling a parameterized view from a materialized view, we expect that the name of the parameterized view does not need to be qualified, and upon execution it will try finding the parameterized view in the same database/namespace in which materialized view was created.
Instead, we observe the UNKNOWN_FUNCTION error on server side during scheduled execution, and querying the materialized view returns empty result.
This can be worked around by explicitly qualifying the name of the parameterized view with database name, but this is inconvenient because we expect to be able to apply the same set of scripts to different databases without having to templatize scripts/substitute db name.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
reproduces on latest i.e. 25.8.2.29
Consider the following repro:
1.  Setup
```
CREATE DATABASE db1;
use db1;
CREATE TABLE tbl1
(
`id` int,
`data` varchar(10)
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY id;
insert into tbl1 (*) values (1,'db1 data');
CREATE VIEW v1
AS SELECT
id,
data,
{p:varchar(10)} as p
FROM tbl1;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv1
REFRESH EVERY 1 MINUTE
ORDER BY id
AS SELECT
id,
data,
p
FROM v1(p='db1 mv1'); -- NOTE: v1 is not qualified by db name
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv2
REFRESH EVERY 1 MINUTE
ORDER BY id
AS SELECT
id,
data,
p
FROM db1.v1(p='db1 mv2');  -- NOTE: v1 is fully qualified by db name
```
2. Queries to illustrate/reproduce issue (after a short while - to give time to execute the materialized views)
2.1 this doesn't work as expected
```
SELECT *
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl2 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = InnoDB;
INSERT INTO tbl2 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'db2 data');
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT id, name, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(255)) AS p FROM tbl2;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv3 AS SELECT id, name, p FROM v2 WHERE p = 'db2 mv3';
key_bug_features: Materialized views fail to qualify nested parameterized views
